reasoning: The base rate anchor is the Polymarket price of 0.12 from August 7. On August 7, GPT-5 was released and immediately took the top spot on the LMSYS Chatbot Arena leaderboard. In response, Elon Musk announced that Grok 5 would be released before the end of the year. For this market to resolve YES, Grok 5 (or another xAI model) must release before December 31, gather enough community votes to enter the leaderboard, and secure the strict highest score. A strict win is necessary because tie-breaking resolves by alphabetical order of the company name, and "xAI" loses to all major competitors (Anthropic, Google, OpenAI, Meta). Grok 4, which was released in July 2025, only reached #4, lagging behind Google's Gemini 2.5 Pro and OpenAI's o3. Given Musk's history of delayed model releases (e.g., Grok 3 delayed from December 2024 to February 2025) and the time needed to accumulate leaderboard votes, the probability of Grok 5 both releasing on time AND beating GPT-5 outright is low. The probability is estimated at 0.11, closely aligned with but slightly lower than the August 7 market benchmark to account for standard time-decay regarding Musk's optimistic timelines.
